{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Subspace Rupture
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|A [[Subspace Rupture]] is a short-lived rupture in reality used as a weapon.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c36">''The Knight'', chapter 36</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
